product_name: Kudelski IoT Security Platform (specifically Kudelski Secure Enclave / KSE)
product_brief: Integrated PQC security IP and services for IoT devices, offering secure boot, provisioning, and firmware updates.
pqc_capability_description: Embedded ML-KEM and ML-DSA algorithms with side-channel/fault countermeasures in Kudelski Secure Enclave (KSE). Includes LMS algorithm support. Features hybrid cryptography for phased migration and crypto agility. Hardware-software hybrid architecture.
key_management_model: Hardware-software hybrid architecture; supports secure boot, update, provisioning, and key management; PUF-based TRNG for entropy (via partnership); PKCS#8/PKCS#12 not explicitly stated.
release_date: 2024-12-03 (Partnership announcement date; specific product release date not stated)
fips_validated: No mention of validation status; mentions alignment with FIPS 203–205 requirements.
primary_platforms: IoT devices, semiconductors, SoCs, Edge devices
target_industries: Automotive, Medical Devices, Smart Home, Semiconductors, National Security, Industrial, AI
regulatory_status: Aligns with CNSA 2.0, NIST, EU CRA, FIPS, ANSSI; mentions compliance with UK PSTI and U.S. IoT Cybersecurity Improvement Act.
pqc_roadmap_details: Supports hybrid cryptography for phased migration; enables post-deployment upgrades; targets US deadline of 2027 and EU deadlines of 2030–2035.
